control_description: Training data ends at train_end_date for each window.
Lag features are created only from historical values available before forecast generation.
Rolling windows exclude test-period and future actual values.
Normalizers are fitted on training-only rows within each window.
Imputation uses training-only information and no future/test rows.
Tuning occurs only through inner validation using training-only data.
Sandbox outputs cannot be promoted to official tournament evidence.
Official runs record locked seeds or deterministic policy.
Official runs record dependency versions when available.
Official runs record data, features, hyperparameters, tuning status, and mode.
No tuning after official evaluation on benchmark windows.
No tuning from tournament rank, champion feedback, significance, MASE, or RMSSE outcomes.
